summary: Tested new Attendance page period filter and Settings page Absence Type Settings relocation. Found and fixed critical bug: ImportsTab still had Absence Type Settings block referencing undefined variables (typesLoading, allTypes, excludedTypes) causing runtime crash when navigating to Imports tab.

test_results.Attendance page loads with YTD selected: PASS - YTD button has bg-white active class

bug_fixed.issue: ImportsTab had leftover Absence Type Settings block (lines ~1522-1566) referencing undefined variables: typesLoading, allTypes, excludedTypes, setExcludedTypes. This caused ReferenceError crash when navigating to Imports tab.
bug_fixed.fix: Removed the entire Absence Type Settings div block from ImportsTab function. The section now only lives in MTSSTab as intended.

critical_code_review_comments: ImportsTab had leftover Absence Type Settings code with undefined variable references - FIXED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: admin@test.local / Admin1234! (click 'Sign in with email & password' first) or use session_token cookie. Attendance page has full period filter working. Settings Imports tab fixed (removed leftover Absence Type Settings block). MTSS tab has the Absence Type Settings with save.
